name: Crab Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion and cook slowly until golden.
3. Add the crabmeat and parsley and cook over low heat, stirring constantly for about 4 minutes.
4. Add the flour and stir to blend. Cook for 3 more minutes.
5. Stir in the chicken broth and simmer gently for 20 minutes. Keep pan partially covered.
6. Add the cream and cayenne pepper. Heat until warm and add salt to taste. Makes 5 cups.
